# Introduction

This book is:

1. the course note in html
1. My own reflections.
2. Extra excercises and examples 
3. Problem solving guides.
4. In places where I felt that the teacher was handwaving^[Though in retrospecet the handwaving is usually a good thing and later on resolved. ], I add some extra theorems. 

## TODOS:

1. add a nice cover (via gemeni prompt that will work for more books)
2. make a quarto friendly videoplayer that shows the transcript. 
   note: idealy a quarto extention with a web component that uses a similar syntax to

```
   {{< video-plus
    src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0j6AZhZFb2M" 
    transcript="file.txt"
    slides="file.pdf"
    >}}
```

3. add reflection to section without.
4. add the ability to exclude stuff from the epub (e.g. the videos) using profiles.
5. some research notes - e.g. ideas to extend the method of moments, including using the MGF and characteristic function to get the moments. 
5. record my own videos.
